channel.title: Sudeepthi's Site on My Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Sudeepthi's Site on My Portfolio

item.title: Project 1
item.description: This is a description of my first project. It’s an amazing web application that does XYZ. You can learn more about it by visiting the project’s GitHub repository or exploring the demo.

item.title: Project 2
item.description:
Project 2

This project is a mobile app I developed that helps users track their fitness goals. It features workout tracking, diet logging, and progress charts.
